seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The word "resign" must appear exactly three times, conveying the definition "to voluntarily leave a job or position."
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "resign" in the email.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The word "resign" must appear exactly three times, conveying the definition "to voluntarily leave a job or position." Avoid using the keyword "resign" in the email.
response:
Subject: Important Update Regarding My Employment

Dear [Boss's Name],

I am writing to formally notify you that I will be voluntarily leaving my position with the company, effective [Date]. This decision marks the end of my tenure here, and I will no longer be employed in this role.

While I have greatly valued my time with the team, I have decided to move on to a new opportunity. Please consider this my official notice to depart, as I will be stepping away from my duties. I want to ensure a smooth transition before I leave, so I am happy to assist with handing over my responsibilities.

Thank you for the opportunities I have had during my time here. I wish you and the company all the best in the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
